sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ لَيْلَى عَمَلَهَا فِي السَّاعَةِ التَّاسِعَةِ صَبَاحًا.
sentences.translation: Lejla počinje svoj posao u devet sati ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Layla starts her work at nine in the morning.

sentences.arabic: تُرَتِّبُ مَكْتَبَهَا ثُمَّ تَقْرَأُ رَسَائِلَ الْبَرِيدِ الْإِلِكْتْرُونِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Sređuje svoj sto, a zatim čita poruke e-pošte.
sentences.translationEn: She organizes her desk and then reads the emails.

sentences.arabic: تَشْرَبُ الْقَهْوَةَ مَعَ زُمَلَائِهَا خِلَالَ الِاسْتِرَاحَةِ الْقَصِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pije kafu sa svojim kolegama tokom kratke pauze.
sentences.translationEn: She drinks coffee with her colleagues during the short break.

sentences.arabic: تُنْهِي جَمِيعَ مَهَامِّهَا قَبْلَ الْعَوْدَةِ إِلَى الْمَنْزِلِ.
sentences.translation: Završava sve svoje zadatke prije povratka kući.
sentences.translationEn: She finishes all her tasks before returning home.
